blended.narrative: Stoneham is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,708 ft. Looking ahead, 45 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
